scripts.build: npm run clean && mkdir -p ./dist/assets && cp ./static ./dist/static/ && cp ./*.html ./dist/ && esbuild `find ./src/ \( -name '*.css' -o -name '*.js' \)` --bundle --splitting --format=esm --outdir=./dist/assets
scripts.build-prod: npm run clean && mkdir -p ./dist/assets && cp -r ./static ./dist/ && cp ./*.html ./dist/ && esbuild `find ./src/ \( -name '*.css' -o -name '*.js' \)` --bundle --minify --splitting --format=esm --outdir=./dist/assets
scripts.watch: npm run clean && mkdir -p ./dist/assets && cp -r ./static ./dist/ && cp ./*.html ./dist/ && esbuild `find ./src/ \( -name '*.css' -o -name '*.js' \)` --bundle --watch --splitting --format=esm --external:*.woff2 --outdir=./dist/assets
